calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Pltf'S Request For Entry Of Default (Court) Judgment Against Deft Rudolph Calvin Byars
Off Calendar Jan-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John Houston Scott, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, LAVONNE SPENCER.
Defendant Rudolph Calvin Byars present in court.

Default of Defendant(s) Rudolph Calvin Byars has been duly entered.

Lavonne Spencer sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1. Lavonne Spences is the legal owner of that 2004 Mercedes Benz SL 55 AMG, License Plate No. 6MSY524, Vehicle Identification Number WDBSK74F34F079904; and
2. The California Deprtment of Motor Vehicles is directed to transfer title to that 2004 Mercedes Benz SL 55 AMG, Licence Plate No. 6MSY524, Vehicle Identification Number WDBSK74F34F079904 from Rudolph Calvin Byars to Lavonne Spencer and issue a new Certificat of Tilte Accordingly, forthwith.
3. The California Department of Justice and/or The San Francisco Police Department remove the allegation and report that the vehicle identified above was stolen.
4. LaVonne Spencer to reimburse Rudolph Calvin Byars $500.00
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
